patch.value: Npm publication is the only remaining release step. Local release gates, tarball artifact smoke, public GitHub pm install smoke, GitHub repository settings, and GitHub release v0.1.0 are complete. The actual npm publish attempt failed with ENEEDAUTH, and npm view still returns E404 for pm-changelog.
Publish pm-changelog to npm after registry authentication

The package is release-ready and npm publish dry-run succeeds, but the actual npm publish command cannot complete because this machine is not authenticated to the npm registry. Publication must be retried after npm login or an npm automation token is configured.

- npm whoami succeeds against https://registry.npmjs.org/.
- npm publish --access public completes for pm-changelog@0.1.0 or the next available release version.
- npm view pm-changelog version returns the published version.
- pm install npm:pm-changelog --project succeeds in a clean temporary pm project and pm changelog generate works from that install path.
Run npm whoami or npm publish --access public from /home/steve/container/pm-packages/pm-changelog.
pm-changelog is published publicly to npm and installable via pm install npm:pm-changelog --project.
npm publish --dry-run succeeds with the 25-file package payload, but npm publish --access public fails with ENEEDAUTH because the machine is not logged in to npm.

value.author: codex
value.text: npm publish --access public failed with ENEEDAUTH; dry-run succeeded and GitHub release v0.1.0 is published.

value.author: codex
value.text: author=codex,created_at=now,text=After npm auth is configured, rerun npm publish --access public and then verify pm install npm:pm-changelog --project in a clean temp folder.

value.author: codex
value.text: pm install does not accept a local .tgz path directly; npm-source smoke tests should npm install the tarball first and then install the extracted node_modules package into pm.

value.note: npm package metadata and publish payload source

value.author: codex
value.text: Updated NPM_TOKEN repo secret from NPM_TOKEN_UNBRAINED on 2026-05-23 without printing the token. Retried npm publish with a temporary npm config; publish reached the registry endpoint but failed with E404 Not Found / no permission for pm-changelog@0.1.0. This indicates the token is loaded but lacks permission to create or publish this package name.

value.author: codex
value.text: Retried after NPM_TOKEN_UNBRAINED was updated again and refreshed the GitHub Actions NPM_TOKEN secret at 2026-05-23T19:50Z. npm whoami with a temporary npm config still returned E401, and npm publish --access public reached the npm publish endpoint but failed with E404 Not Found / no permission for pm-changelog@0.1.0. The token is loaded, but npm does not authorize it to create or publish the unscoped package name.

author: codex

value.author: codex
value.text: Fresh publication retry on 2026-05-23T19:55Z: NPM_TOKEN and NPM_TOKEN_UNBRAINED are unset in the shell; npm whoami returns ENEEDAUTH; npm view pm-changelog returns E404; npm publish --access public builds and packs the 25-file tarball but fails with ENEEDAUTH before upload. npm publish --access public --dry-run succeeds with the expected public package payload.

message: Record final npm auth blocker evidence

value.author: codex
value.text: NPM_MEDIA_SERVER is the working npm automation token for this package publication flow.

value.author: codex
value.text: Publication used a temporary npmrc that was removed after the command; the token was not written into repository files.

value.author: codex
value.text: Npm-source smoke passed in /tmp/pm-changelog-npm-6vxLt7: pm install npm:pm-changelog --project,package doctor,and pm changelog generate all succeeded.

value.author: codex
value.text: Resolved after using NPM_MEDIA_SERVER from ~/.bashrc without printing the token. npm publish completed successfully and npm registry now exposes pm-changelog@0.1.0.

patch.value: npm whoami with a temporary npm config returned unbrained; npm publish --access public completed for pm-changelog@0.1.0; npm view pm-changelog version returned 0.1.0; clean temp project /tmp/pm-changelog-npm-6vxLt7 installed npm:pm-changelog and generated CHANGELOG.md containing Verify npm pm install.

Published pm-changelog@0.1.0 publicly to npm using the NPM_MEDIA_SERVER token loaded from ~/.bashrc, verified registry visibility, and verified pm install npm:pm-changelog --project in a clean temporary pm project.
npm publication completed successfully and pm install npm:pm-changelog --project was verified in a clean temporary project.
